components.text: Fasting Pills are a sustainable alternative to food. Very popular among cultivators who still require sustenance.

Fasting Pills are some of the most popular pills for budding cultivators! 
Until you obtain a level of power that allows you to sustain your self with Qi alone, Fasting Pills are the best food option. 

 Fasting Pills come in 3 different Tiers. Each with their own Saturation and Saturation Modifier!

The crafting Recipe for this pill is Unique! You will first need to make a $(b)$(cl:pillcrafting)Pill Cauldron$(/el)$(/b)! 

The Crafting Recipes is as follows! 4 Apples, 1 Golden Sun Leaf, 4 Dried Kelp and 30 Heat. This has a 50% chance to succeed and give you 4 Fasting Pills Tier 1

To get a higher tier Fasting Pill the recipe is the following for Tier 2. 2 Golden Apples, 2 Fasting Pills of the previous tier, 8 Dried Kelp and 60 Heat for a 40% chance to get 4 Tier 2 Pills! 

The Recipe for Tier 3 is the following. 4 Golden Apples, 2 Fasting Pills of the previous tier, 16 Dried Kelp and 120 Heat for a 30% chance to get 4 Fasting Pills Tier 3!
